title: carex schreberi subsp. ohmuelleriana
intro: Carex schreberi subsp. ohmuelleriana, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Carex schreberi subsp. ohmuelleriana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
